GBEGlobal Banking Empowerment
Overview 01Move Money 02Cards 03Statements 04Support 05Security 06Profile 07
Security & account rules

Protect your account

Good banking starts with good safeguards.

Review the customer rules, transfer protections, and support standards that keep your account secure.

All protections active

Sign-in & access

  • Keep your password private and use a unique password.
  • Sign out on shared devices.
  • Report an unfamiliar sign-in straight away.

Payments & transfers

  • Review recipient details before you send money.
  • Some payments may be held for security review.
  • Contact support quickly for an incorrect transfer or disputed card purchase.

Cards & alerts

  • Keep card details private and never share a verification code.
  • Use card controls if a card is lost, stolen, or not with you.
  • Review account activity and alerts regularly.

Support services

Support for the moments that need a person.

Support can explain transactions, guide card and transfer questions, update case details, and arrange a verified callback. They will never ask for your password or one-time security code in a message.

Contact support

Important boundaries

Account protection rules

Account access, identity updates, large transfers, and disputes may require extra verification. Customer accounts cannot approve their own reviews or change controls reserved for internal operations.

Verification may be required
